Member of Parliament for Royal Sutton Coldfield since 2001

Former Deputy Foreign Secretary and Shadow Foreign Secretary.

It is my pleasure and privilege to serve the people of Royal Sutton Coldfield. I always work hard to help local residents and to champion the issues of importance to our town.

I hope that this website provides you with a useful insight into some of the work I do on behalf of my constituents – both in Sutton Coldfield and in the House of Commons.

Over the year thousands of local residents contact me by letter, email and in person. If I can be of any help to you, please do not hesitate to get in touch.

You can also follow me over on my Facebook page here.



Rt Hon Sir Andrew Mitchell MP

In Pictures
Proud to cut the ribbon and officially open Harvey Norman
24 April 2026

Today local MP Sir Andrew Mitchell and former West Midlands Mayor Sir Andy Street officially opened the new Harvey Norman store in our town centre.
Backing Sutton United to win promotion
24 April 2026

Yesterday Sir Andrew Mitchell visited Sutton United Football Club in Coleshill Road alongside Reddicap councillor Richard Parkin, ahead of the club’s much anticipated play-off semi-final this weekend at home against Heather St Johns FC.
Tackling offroad bike menace
17 April 2026

Sir Andrew Mitchell recently welcomed local resident Lee Bashford to his advice surgery who has raised concerns about off-road motorbikes on The Greenway and surrounding area. 
Weekly Message
Weekly Message to Constituents 315 - A new era for our town centre
24 April 2026

Today it was my great pleasure to join our former West Midlands Mayor Sir Andy Street to officially open the new Harvey Norman store in our town centre.
Weekly Message to Constituents 314 - Frustration as development gets go-ahead despite campaign
17 April 2026

Unwanted Wishaw battery plan gets the green light despite community opposition.
Weekly Message to Constituents 313 - A welcome boost for local healthcare
10 April 2026

This week I had a wonderful time officially opening the brand new Vesey Pharmacy at Ley Hill Surgery – a welcome addition to Sutton Coldfield’s healthcare services.
All News
In Parliament
Sir Andrew Mitchell pushes for a clear national accident prevention strategy
28 April 2026

Sir Andrew Mitchell leads a Westminster Hall debate on the importance of developing a clear and comprehensive national accident prevention strategy.
Sir Andrew Mitchell presses Government to get tough on overseas territories over beneficial ownership registers
21 April 2026

Sir Andrew Mitchell calls on the Government to end the delay and take a tougher stance against those overseas territories that still have not established publicly accessible registers of beneficial ownership as required under the Sanctions and Anti-Money Laundering Act 2018.
Sir Andrew Mitchell calls out PM for shifting blame onto Sir Olly Robbins in Mandelson vetting scandal
20 April 2026

Former Deputy Foreign Secretary Sir Andrew Mitchell challenges the Prime Minister for attempting to shift responsibility onto senior civil servant Sir Olly Robbins for the vetting controversy surrounding Peter Mandelson’s appointment as UK Ambassador to the United States.
All Parliament News
Map

Posts from X
The Kigali Declaration

Andrew has a keen interest in international development and in 2007 founded Project Umubano, the Conservative Party’s ten-year social action project in Rwanda. The project culminated with the Kigali Declaration against Genocide and Identity-based Violence.

Articles
Britain has lost its once great development prowess
9 December 2024

Former Deputy Foreign Secretary Andrew Mitchell writes for The House Magazine.
We’ll be letting ourselves down, not just Ukraine, if we waver from anything but total support
23 September 2024

Shadow Foreign Secretary and former Deputy Foreign Secretary, Rt Hon Andrew Mitchell MP writes for ConservativeHome.
The case for bringing Shamima Begum back is now irrefutable
1 September 2022

The latest revelations about security service collusion in respect of Ms Shamima Begum make alarming reading. It has been obvious from the outset that she and her foolish young friends were groomed. Now we discover that ministers knew she was a trafficking victim, transported by a terrorist group, but chose to strip her of her British citizenship regardless.
All Articles

Rt Hon Sir Andrew Mitchell MP
House of Commons
London SW1A 0AA

Westminster Office: 020 7219 8516

Constituency Office: 0121 354 2229

Email: andrew.mitchell.mp@parliament.uk

 

Sutton Coldfield Constituency: Sutton Four Oaks, Sutton Mere Green, Sutton Reddicap, Sutton Roughley, Sutton Trinity, Sutton Vesey, Sutton Walmley & Minworth, Sutton Wylde Green.
